# Vehicle Code
## Division 4. SPECIAL ANTITHEFT LAWS [10500 - 10904]
### Chapter 1.5. Reports of Stolen Vessels [10550 - 10554]
##### § 10550

In this chapter, unless the context clearly requires a different meaning, the terms and definitions set forth in Section 9840 shall apply.

*(Amended by Stats. 1973, Ch. 759.)*

subsections.text: In this chapter, unless the context clearly requires a different meaning, the terms and definitions set forth in Section 9840 shall apply.
